pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run as Java 8 code, failing to utilize Java 11 features or comply with the migration goal.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the JaCoCo Maven plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo may fail to instrument or run on Java 11 due to internal API changes or bytecode incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace the javax.inject API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed the javax.inject module from the JDK, and modern frameworks often require the Jakarta namespace; without this, compilation fails if code references jakarta.inject.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace the javax.annotation API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed the javax.annotation module from the JDK; without this dependency, compilation fails if code references jakarta.annotation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for creating Path instances.
Update import statement to use Path instead of Paths to match the new API usage.
